assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 35: '## Security Configuration' heading is present.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 37-43: '### Product Lifecycle' subsection exists with all 5 fields: 'Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', 'Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', 'Component label pattern: pscomponent:', 'VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 45-49: '### Version Streams' subsection contains a table with a row for stream '2.1.x' with Konflux Release Repo 'git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 51-56: '### Source Repositories' subsection contains a table with 'backend | https://github.com/example/backend' and 'frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, and Code Intelligence with Limitations
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains '## Repository Registry' (line 3), '## Jira Configuration' (line 9), '## Code Intelligence' (line 18), and '### Limitations' (line 31) with content 'No limitations known — no Serena instances reported issues.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 37: 'Security Configuration opted in and fully populated.' Lines 34-36 state: 'No existing Security Configuration section found in CLAUDE.md. User was asked whether to enable security triage — user accepted.' Lines 41-45 document all Product Lifecycle fields being collected from the user. Lines 50-51 document Version Streams being collected. Lines 55-57 document Source Repositories being collected.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md line 5: 'The existing CLAUDE.md had no `# Project Configuration` section. All configuration sections were created new.' Line 36: '### ## Security Configuration (new)' with subheadings for Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories. Lines 9-34 confirm Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, and Code Intelligence were also newly added.
